query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM gestantes g
LEFT JOIN partosRealizados pr ON pr.gestanteId = g.id
LEFT JOIN abortamentos ab ON ab.gestanteId = g.id
WHERE g.clinicaId = (SELECT id FROM clinicas WHERE codigo = '00001')
AND g.telefone IS NOT NULL 
AND g.telefone != ''
AND pr.id IS NULL
AND ab.id IS NULL
